title: Personal information; limit on use
doc_html:
Art. 1307.12. Personal information; limit on use

            Personal information gathered or transmitted under this Section may be used only for the purposes for which it was gathered or transmitted.

            Acts 2015, No. 80, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
doc_text:
Art. 1307.12.  Personal information; limit on use
Personal information gathered or transmitted under this Section may be used only for
the purposes for which it was gathered or transmitted.
Acts 2015, No. 80, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
